titleStmt.title: SII 41.283: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 283. (A.R. No. 499A of 1905.) Jambukēśvaram, Tiruchirappalli Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District. On the east wall of the third prakārā in the Jambukēśvara temple at Tiruvānaikāval.

summary.p: This is related to the above inscription referring to the deed called kīḻipuṇai-tīṭṭu given by Maṇavāḷa-muttaraiyaṉ who had kāṇi rights in Pudukkuḍi alias Rājēndirachōḻa-maṅgalam, a hamlet of Tiruveḷḷaṟai in Vaḍavaḻi-nāḍu. He gave the deed asserting that he received in one kiḻi (pouch) the entire sum of 4000 kāsu, the price amount of the four shares, from the temple trustees and handed over the same to the sellers of the share.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
tribhuvanacakravattikaḷ śrīrājarājarājarāja = [Picture]tevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 Āvatuuṭaiyār tiruvāṉaikkāvuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyil Āticaṇṭeśvarateva kaṉmikaḷukku rā[ja*]rā[ja] vaḷa nāṭṭu vaṭavaḻināṭṭu tiruveḷḷaṟaippiṭākai putukkuṭiyāṉa rā[je]ntira coḻamaṅkalattuk kāṇi Uṭaiya kaḷḷaril perumāṉ Aḻa
kaṉāṉa maṇavāḷa muttarayaṉeṉ kiḻippuṇaittiṭṭukkuṭutta paricāvatu kāricāttaṉ kuṟaiyil Oṭamuṭaiyāril tāmaṇi tevaṉāṉa niṟai Uṭaic coḻapperayaṉum Ivaṉ tampi Uṭaiyāṉ rājarājarājarāja = [Picture]nāṭāḻvāṉum periyāṉ nārāyaṇaṉum Ivaṉ tampi Ampālavaṉ poṉṉampala nāṭāḻvāṉum Uṭaiyāṉ Āti Āṉa
coḻapāṇṭiyapperayaṉum Ivaṉ tampi tiriya Iruntāṉum kulaiyaṉ tāḻiyāṉa vitiviṭaṅka nāṭāḻvāṉum pakkal kāricāttaṅkuṟaiyil viṟṟa paṅku nālukkum pramāṇa vilaippaṭi kācu 4 1000 Ikkācu nālāyiram Iv Āticaṇṭeśvara tevarkaṉmikaḷ pakkal Oru kiḻippaṭa vāṅki Inta tāmaṇitevaṉāṉa
neṟi Uṭaiccoḻapperayaṉum Ivaṉ tampi Uṭaiyāṉ rājarājarājarāja = [Picture]nāṭāḻvāṉum periyāṉ nārayaṇaṉum Ivaṉ tampi Ampalavaṉ poṉṉampala nāṭāḻvāṉ Uṭaiyāṉ Ātiyāṉa coḻapāṇṭiya perayaṉum Ivaṉ tampi tiriyairuntāṉum kulaiyaṉtāḻiyāṉa vitiviṭaṅka nāṭāḻvāṉum Ivvaṉai
varpakkalum kuṭuttu kuṭuttapaṭikku kiḻippuṇaiy niṉṟu kiḻippuṇaittiṭṭukkuṭutteṉ Uṭaiyār tiruvāṉaikkāvuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyil Āticaṇṭeśvara tevarkaṉmikaḷukku perumāṉ Aḻakaṉāṉa maṇavāḷa muttarayaṉeṉ Ivai Eṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ civañāṉakuṟai
Aracūr kavuciyaṉ tillaippirāṉ Āṇṭār cattivaṉapperumāḷeḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ civañānakkuṟaikkoḻuvaṉ Āḷumpirāṉ poṟkoyil nampi Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ vaḷavaṉ nallūr Ālaṅkuṭaiyāṉ miṉavaṉ pallavaraiyaṉeṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ ta miḻalai nampiyeṉ Ippa
ṭi Aṟiveṉ taṇṭaṅkuṟai vikkirama coḻa nāṭuṭaiyāṉ viḷānāṭṭu veḷāṉ Eḻuttu Ikkācunālāyiramum kaikkoṇṭamaikku Ivai neṟi Uṭaiccoḻapperayaṉ Uḷḷiṭṭār sayiñaiyāṉamaikku Ivai kiḻāṟṟūr Araiyaṉeḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 41.283 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
